title: John Van Fleet
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|John}}
{{Image|person}}
'''John Van Fleet''' is an illustrator who has provided illustrations for numerous ''[[Star Wars]]'' titles including:
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by John Van Fleet}}
*''[[Star Wars: Boba Fett]]''
*''[[Hero's Guide]]''
*''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''
*''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Last of the Jedi]]''
**[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission|''The Desperate Mission'']]
**[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning|''Dark Warning'']]
**[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld|''Underworld'']]
**[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo|''Death on Naboo'']]
**[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web|''A Tangled Web'']]
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]
*''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']]
*[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']]
*[[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'']]
*''[[Choices of One]]''
*''[[The Guns of Kelrodo-Ai]]''

{{Bio-stub}}
